compiledTemplates.template-0: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b(t.v(t.f("sudo",c,p,0)));t.b("apt install curl gnupg2");t.b("\n" + i);t.b(t.v(t.f("sudo",c,p,0)));t.b("curl -sSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ros/rosdistro/master/ros.key  -o /usr/share/keyrings/ros-archive-keyring.gpg");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
compiledTemplates.template-1: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("echo \"deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/ros-archive-keyring.gpg] ");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/ubuntu ");t.b(t.v(t.f("release",c,p,0)));t.b(" main\" | ");t.b(t.v(t.f("sudo",c,p,0)));t.b("tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/ros2.list > /dev/null");t.b("\n");t.b("\n" + i);t.b(t.v(t.f("sudo",c,p,0)));t.b("apt update");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
